name.ja: <ruby>健<rt>けん</rt></ruby><ruby>康<rt>こう</rt></ruby><ruby>賢<rt>けん</rt></ruby><ruby>明<rt>めい</rt></ruby><ruby>早<rt>はや</rt></ruby><ruby>押<rt>お</rt></ruby>しバトル！

effect.en: Ritual Summon a Level 7 Pyro Type monster by sending 1 Level 7 or higher Pyro Type monster with 1300 DEF from your hand or field to the Graveyard as material. You cannot use a monster on your field as material by this effect, except "Healthie Cafferin".
